testcase.name: Authentication › login page renders correctly
Authentication › register page renders correctly
Authentication › login page links to register page
Authentication › register page links back to login
Authentication › unauthenticated user redirected from /dashboard to /login
Authentication › unauthenticated user redirected from /notebook/* to /login
Authentication › login shows error on wrong credentials
Authentication › register shows password strength indicators
Authentication › register shows error for weak password on submit
Authentication › full registration and redirect to dashboard
Authentication › full login flow and redirect to dashboard
Authentication › / root redirects to /dashboard (then to /login if not authenticated)
Dashboard › dashboard loads and shows header
Dashboard › dashboard shows "Create New" button
Dashboard › create notebook via modal and navigate to it
Dashboard › created notebook appears on dashboard
Dashboard › clicking notebook card navigates to notebook
Dashboard › logout from dashboard redirects to login
Notebook Page › notebook page renders three panels
Notebook Page › notebook name is visible
Notebook Page › back button navigates to dashboard
Notebook Page › sources panel shows upload option
Notebook Page › chat input is visible
Notebook Page › add sources opens upload modal with file input
Notebook Page › notebook page has studio panel area
AI Chat › chat input is visible
AI Chat › empty notebook shows upload prompt in chat
AI Chat › send button is disabled for empty notebook
AI Chat › chat heading is visible
AI Chat › notebook name appears in chat area
AI Chat › source count shows in chat area
AI Chat › AI disclaimer is visible
Studio Features › studio panel heading is visible
Studio Features › summary button or option is present
Studio Features › FAQ option is present
Studio Features › action items option is present
Studio Features › saved notes section is present
Studio Features › mind map option is present
Studio Features › clicking summary shows generate button or starts generation
Notebook Sharing › share button is visible in notebook
Notebook Sharing › clicking share opens share modal
Notebook Sharing › share modal has invite link section
Notebook Sharing › invalid join token shows error page
Notebook Sharing › share modal can be closed
Document Upload › add sources button is visible
Document Upload › clicking add sources opens upload modal
Document Upload › upload modal has file input
Document Upload › upload a TXT file via modal
Document Upload › upload modal has URL input option
Navigation & Public Pages › 404 page for unknown route
Navigation & Public Pages › privacy policy page loads
Navigation & Public Pages › terms of service page loads
Navigation & Public Pages › help center page loads
Navigation & Public Pages › forgot password page loads
Navigation & Public Pages › forgot password page has email input
Navigation & Public Pages › 404 page has link to dashboard
Navigation & Public Pages › login page URL is correct
Navigation & Public Pages › register page URL is correct
Navigation & Public Pages › page title includes Noteflow branding
Navigation & Public Pages › invalid join token page renders (auth guard redirects to login)
